content.text:
Looking at the image, the track appears as a wide green surface with the dark wall visible on the left side — the car seems to be near the left/outer boundary of a right-hand curve, heading roughly southwest.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 79, target = 79 + 5 = 84
- Waypoint 84: x=6.0793, y=2.7734
- Car position: x=1.6356, y=4.9058
- Bearing = atan2(2.7734 - 4.9058, 6.0793 - 1.6356) = atan2(-2.1324, 4.4437)
- = atan2(-2.1324, 4.4437) ≈ -25.65°
- Current heading: 144.40°
- Delta = -25.65 - 144.40 = -170.05° → normalize: -170.05 + 360 = 189.95° → still -170.05°

The heading wrap-around issue persists. Car heading ~144° (facing southwest), waypoint 84 is to the east-southeast. The car is off-track and needs to continue the right-hand curve aggressively.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Car is off-track (all_wheels_on_track=false) with heading 144° in a right-hand curve, drifting to the outer boundary; must maintain maximum right steering at low speed to recover and complete the curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track has a long westward straight around waypoints 70-76, heading ~160-170°",
    "After waypoint ~76, track curves sharply south then southeast — sustained right steering needed",
    "Lookahead waypoints beyond the curve give misleading large deltas due to heading wrap-around at ~180°",
    "When navigating the right-hand curve after waypoint 76, use -25 steering at speed 0.75",
    "Car has been off-track for multiple steps (steps 116-117) — drifting to outer edge of right curve",
    "all_wheels_on_track=false at steps 116-117 with distance_from_center=0.43 (track_width=0.76)",
    "Car heading decreasing: 169→152→148→144 — right turn is working but car still off track",
    "Must maintain maximum right steering (-25) at low speed (0.75) until back on track",
    "Car is right of center (is_left_of_center=false) — on outside of right-hand curve",
    "Visual shows dark wall on left — car near outer boundary, need to steer hard right to cut inside"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [1.831, 1.775, 1.725, 1.676, 1.636],
    "y": [4.715, 4.759, 4.806, 4.855, 4.906],
    "yaw": [161.295, 156.583, 152.308, 148.741, 144.399]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": -170.05,
  "speed": 0.75,
  "steering_angle": -25.0
}
```
